falsification_conditions.condition: The asset price rises above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend, contradicting the pattern's historical bottom behavior.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 90-day average volume on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike would indicate extreme market participation, directly contradicting the 'blowoff score' of 38 and suggesting a potential reversal rather than continuation of the historical pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank announces a policy change that directly increases demand for the asset by 25% or more in market impact analysis
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This exogenous catalyst would falsify the current pattern-based verdict by introducing a new, observable driver that overrides historical correlations.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
